name: EchoClip
description: record and clip your gameplay. bind a key to save the last attempt, message axiom_thebsdude on discord if you have issues

enabled.name: Enable Recording
enabled.description: start recording when entering a level

clip-keybind.name: Save Clip
clip-keybind.description: press to save the last N seconds as a clip

target-fps.name: Target FPS
target-fps.description: recording framerate, higher = smoother but more cpu

bitrate.name: Bitrate (Mbps)
bitrate.description: video bitrate for the temp recording

codec.name: Video Codec
codec.description: hardware encoding is better if your gpu supports it

att-clip-count.name: Attempt History Count
att-clip-count.description: how many attempts back the clip should start from

storage-limit.name: Storage Limit (GB)
storage-limit.description: automatically delete old clips when folder exceeds this size

clip-on-new-best.name: Clip on New Best
clip-on-new-best.description: automatically save a clip when you hit a new best percent
